title: Viviania crenata
taxonomy: Viviania crenata is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Viviania, which is a group of succulent plants. The family Caryophyllaceae, to which Viviania crenata belongs, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as pinks or carnations. These plants are found in a variety of habitats, including grasslands, rocky outcrops, and sandy dunes. Viviania crenata is native to the Americas, specifically the Andes mountain range.
